Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entering Judgment Pursuant To Defendants Default Under Settlement And Release Agreement
Off Calendar Sep-26-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Rachel Haney, Esq. 877-344-4002 Grustel Law Firm for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested/Discussed. Counsel informs the Court they accidentally filed 2 of the same motion and are not opposing the tentative ruling. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WESTLAKE SERVICES, LLC'S Motion For Entering Judgment Pursuant To Defendants Default Under Settlement And Release Agreement.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for entering judgment pursuant to defendant's default under settlement and release agreement" is granted.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling.
Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
